item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-n08","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":false,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":null,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant correctly treated the request as an explicit move away from page-level patches toward an upstream redesign.
